name: Acolyte
instructions:
You may trash an Action or Victory card from your hand to gain a Gold.
You may trash this to gain an Augur.

name: Archer
instructions:
+$2
Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand reveals all but one, and discards one of those you choose.

name: Architects' Guild
instructions: When you gain a card, you may spend 2 Favors to gain a cheaper non-Victory card.

name: Augurs
instructions: Setup: This pile starts the game with 4 copies each of Herb Gatherer, Acolyte, Sorceress, and Sibyl, in that order. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

name: Band of Nomads
instructions: When you gain a card costing $3 or more, you may spend a Favor, for +1 Card, or +1 Action, or +1 Buy.

name: Barbarian
instructions:
+$2
Each other player trashes the top card of their deck. If it costs $3 or more they gain a cheaper card sharing a type with it; otherwise they gain a Curse.

name: Battle Plan
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
You may reveal an Attack card from your hand for +1 Card.
You may rotate any Supply pile.

name: Bauble
instructions: Choose two different options: +1 Buy; +$1; +1 Favor; this turn, when you gain a card, you may put it onto your deck.

name: Blacksmith
instructions: Choose one: Draw until you have 6 cards in hand; or +2 Cards; or +1 Card and +1 Action.

name: Broker
Capital City
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
You may discard 2 cards for +$2.
You may pay $2 for +2 Cards.

name: Carpenter
instructions:
If no Supply piles are empty, +1 Action and gain a card costing up to $4.
Otherwise, trash a card from your hand and gain a card costing up to $2 more than it.

name: Cave Dwellers
instructions: At the start of your turn, you may spend a Favor, to discard a card then draw a card. Repeat as desired.

name: Circle of Witches
instructions: After playing a Liaison, you may spend 3 Favors to have each other player gain a Curse.

name: City-state
instructions: When you gain an Action card during your turn, you may spend 2 Favors to play it.

name: Clashes
instructions: Setup: This pile starts the game with 4 copies each of Battle Plan, Archer, Warlord, and Territory, in that order. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

name: Coastal Haven
instructions: When discarding your hand in Clean-up, you may spend any number of Favors to keep that many cards in hand for next turn (you still draw 5).

name: Conjurer
instructions:
Gain a card costing up to $4.
At the start of your next turn, put this into your hand.

name: Contract
instructions:
$2
+1 Favor
You may set aside an Action from your hand to play it at the start of your next turn.

name: Courier
instructions:
+$1
Discard the top card of your deck. Look through your discard pile; you may play an Action or Treasure from it.

name: Crafters' Guild
instructions: At the start of your turn, you may spend 2 Favors to gain a card costing up to $4 onto your deck.

name: Desert Guides
instructions: At the start of your turn, you may spend a Favor to discard your hand and draw 5 cards. Repeat as desired.

name: Distant Shore
instructions:
+2 Cards
+1 Action
Gain an Estate.
-----
2 VP

name: Elder
instructions:
+$2
You may play an Action card from your hand. When it gives you a choice of abilities (with "choose") this turn, you may choose an extra (different) option.

name: Emissary
instructions:
+3 Cards
If this made you shuffle (at least one card), +1 Action and +2 Favors.

name: Family of Inventors
instructions: At the start of your Buy phase, you may put a Favor token you have on a non-Victory Supply pile. Cards cost $1 less per Favor token on their piles.

name: Fellowship of Scribes
instructions: After playing an Action, if you have 4 or fewer cards in hand, you may spend a Favor for +1 Card.

name: Forest Dwellers
instructions: At the start of your turn, you may spend a Favor to look at the top 3 cards of your deck, discard any number and put the rest back in any order.

name: Forts
instructions: Setup: This pile starts the game with 4 copies each of Tent, Garrison, Hill Fort, and Stronghold, in that order. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

name: Galleria
instructions:
+$3
This turn, when you gain a card costing $3 or $4, +1 Buy.

name: Gang of Pickpockets
instructions: At the start of your turn, discard down to 4 cards in hand unless you spend a Favor.

name: Garrison
instructions:
+$2
This turn, when you gain a card, add a token here. At the start of your next turn, remove them for +1 Card each.

name: Guildmaster
instructions:
+$3
This turn, when you gain a card, +1 Favor.

name: Herb Gatherer
instructions:
+1 Buy
Put your deck into your discard pile. Look through it and you may play a Treasure from it.
You may rotate the Augurs.

name: Highwayman
instructions:
At the start of your next turn, discard this from play and +3 Cards.
Until then, the first Treasure each other player plays each turn does nothing.

name: Hill Fort
instructions: Gain a card costing up to $4. Choose one: Put it into your hand; or +1 Card and +1 Action.

name: Hunter
instructions:
+1 Action
Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. From those cards, put an Action, a Treasure, and a Victory card into your hand. Discard the rest.

name: Importer
instructions:
At the start of your next turn, gain a card costing up to $5.
-----
Setup: Each player gets +4 Favors.

name: Innkeeper
instructions:
+1 Action
Choose one: +1 Card; or +3 Cards, then discard 3 cards; or +5 Cards, then discard 6 cards.

name: Island Folk
instructions: At the end of your turn, you may spend 5 Favors to take an extra turn after this one (but not a 3rd turn in a row).

name: League of Bankers
instructions: At the start of your Buy phase, +$1 per 4 Favors you have (round down).

name: League of Shopkeepers
instructions: After playing a Liaison, if you have 5 or more Favors, +$1, and if 10 or more, +1 Action and +1 Buy.

name: Lich
instructions:
+6 Cards
+2 Actions
Skip a turn.
-----
When you trash this, discard it and gain a cheaper card from the trash.

name: Market Towns
instructions: At the start of your Buy phase, you may spend a Favor to play an Action card from your hand. Repeat as desired.

name: Marquis
instructions:
+1 Buy
+1 Card per card in your hand. Discard down to 10 cards in hand.

name: Merchant Camp
instructions:
+2 Actions
+$1
-----
When you discard this from play, you may put it onto your deck.

name: Miller
instructions:
+1 Action
Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and discard the rest.

name: Modify
instructions: Trash a card from your hand. Choose one: +1 Card and +1 Action; or gain a card costing up to $2 more than the trashed card.

name: Mountain Folk
instructions: At the start of your turn, you may spend 5 Favors for +3 Cards.

name: Odysseys
instructions: Setup: This pile starts the game with 4 copies each of Old Map, Voyage, Sunken Treasure, and Distant Shore, in that order. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

name: Old Map
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Discard a card. +1 Card.
You may rotate the Odysseys.

name: Order of Astrologers
instructions: When shuffling, you may pick one card per Favor you spend to go on top.

name: Order of Masons
instructions: When shuffling, you may pick up to 2 cards per Favor you spend to put into your discard pile.

name: Peaceful Cult
instructions: At the start of your Buy phase, you may spend any number of Favors to trash that many cards from your hand.

name: Plateau Shepherds
instructions: When scoring, pair up your Favors with cards you have costing $2, for 2 VP per pair.

name: Royal Galley
instructions:
+1 Card
You may play a non-Duration Action card from your hand. Set it aside; if you did, then at the start of your next turn, play it.

name: Sentinel
instructions: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may trash up to 2 of them. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Sibyl
instructions:
+4 Cards
+1 Action
Put a card from your hand on top of your deck, and another on the bottom.

name: Skirmisher
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
+$1
This turn, when you gain an Attack card, each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Sorcerer
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Each other player names a card, then reveals the top card of their deck. If wrong, they gain a Curse.

name: Sorceress
instructions:
+1 Action
Name a card. Reveal the top card of your deck and put it into your hand. If it's the named card, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Specialist
instructions: You may play an Action or Treasure from your hand. Choose one: Play it again; or gain a copy of it.

name: Stronghold
instructions:
Choose one: +$3; or at the start of your next turn, +3 Cards.
-----
2 VP

name: Student
instructions:
+1 Action
You may rotate the Wizards.
Trash a card from your hand. If it's a Treasure, +1 Favor and put this onto your deck.

name: Sunken Treasure
instructions: Gain an Action card you don't have a copy of in play.

name: Swap
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
You may return an Action from your hand to its pile, to gain to your hand a different Action costing up to $5.

name: Sycophant
instructions:
+1 Action
Discard 3 cards. If you discarded at least one, +$3.
-----
When you gain or trash this, +2 Favors.

name: Tent
instructions:
+$2
You may rotate the Forts.
-----
When you discard this from play, you may put it onto your deck.

name: Territory
instructions:
Worth 1 VP per differently named Victory card you have.
-----
When you gain this, gain a Gold per empty Supply pile.

name: Town
instructions: Choose one: +1 Card and +2 Actions; or +1 Buy and +$2.

name: Town Crier
instructions:
Choose one: +$2; or gain a Silver; or +1 Card and +1 Action.
You may rotate the Townsfolk.

name: Townsfolk
instructions: Setup: This pile starts the game with 4 copies each of Town Crier, Blacksmith, Miller, and Elder, in that order. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

name: Trappers' Lodge
instructions: When you gain a card, you may spend a Favor to put it onto your deck.

name: Underling
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
+1 Favor

name: Voyage
instructions:
+1 Action
Take an extra turn after this one (but not a 3rd turn in a row), during which you can only play 3 cards from your hand.

name: Warlord
instructions:
+1 Action
At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards. Until then, other players can't play an Action from their hand that they have 2 or more copies of in play.

name: Wizards
instructions: Setup: This pile starts the game with 4 copies each of Student, Conjurer, Sorcerer, and Lich, in that order. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

name: Woodworkers' Guild
instructions: At the start of your Buy phase, you may spend a Favor to trash an Action card from your hand. If you did, gain an Action card.
